article:
Double-clicking on the jar will show the following window:
The Window allows to open one or several TrueType or OpenType fonts. Each font will add a new tab:
The menu bar contains severals menus:
File menu: allows to open a Font file, or save the characteristics of the selected Font in an html file
Tools menu: allows to refresh the characteristics of the selected Font after havinf modified it Font size or associated text
The toolbar shows the screen resolution in pixels per inch.
Each tab represents a Font and has two parts:
The characteristics of the font
A diagram showing the values for the text chosen for the font
This contains:
Two editable fields allowing to set the size of the Font in points and the text used to compute the associated characteristics
A non editable table showing the associated characteristics
To be able to refresh the content of the table after having modified the Font size or associated text, you must apply the Tools => Refresh option.
The characteristics are all shown in points and mm:
The font size, which is the same value of the associated editable field
The font ascent
The font descent
The font height
The font advance value
The font leading value
The width and height of the text box
The diagram shows the font characteristics for the selected text:
